title: Yosys not removing DFF with constant input and replacing with a constant driver.

features.name: DFF with constant input not optimized by opt_dff
features.description: Code should include a DFF (D flip-flop) cell with a constant input signal driven by a literal value 1'b0 or 1'h0, where the DFF should be optimizable by opt_dff but is not recognized after abc liberty mapping

features.name: keep attribute on wire declaration prevents optimization
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration with the (* keep *) attribute applied, which prevents Yosys from optimizing away the wire and its driver

features.name: unpacked array of wires for instruction memory
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array of wires declaration used to model instruction memory content, where each element is assigned a packed constant value
